title: KATSEYE Releases New Single 'Animal'
description: Korean singer-songwriter KATSEYE has released a new single titled 'Animal', which is being praised for its dark and cinematic sound.

sources.title: KATSEYE teases dark, cinematic return with new single 'Animal'

sections.heading: Release Information
paragraphs: According to Weverse, KATSEYE released the single 'Animal' recently.

sections.heading: Critical Reception
paragraphs: The Korea Times describes the new single as a 'dark, cinematic return' for KATSEYE.

sections.heading: Song Review
paragraphs: A song review on the website thebiaslist.com discusses the release of 'Animal' by KATSEYE.

faq.q: What is the title of KATSEYE's new single?
faq.a: The title of KATSEYE's new single is 'Animal'.
